name: Frontend Developer
description: Master modern frontend development from HTML/CSS fundamentals to advanced React, TypeScript, and full-stack capabilities.

phases.title: Web Foundations
items: 📐 Master semantic HTML5 and CSS3 (flexbox, grid, responsive design)
💻 Learn JavaScript fundamentals: ES6+, DOM manipulation, async/await
🔧 Set up developer environment: VS Code, Git, Chrome DevTools
📦 Understand npm/yarn, module bundlers (Vite, Webpack basics)
🎯 Build a responsive landing page from scratch using only HTML/CSS/JS
📚 Study accessibility (ARIA, WCAG 2.1) and SEO best practices

phases.title: Framework Mastery & Tooling
items: ⚛️ Learn React deeply: hooks, context, custom hooks, portals
🛠️ Master TypeScript: generics, utility types, advanced patterns
📐 Learn state management (Zustand, Redux Toolkit, or Jotai)
🧪 Write tests with Vitest, React Testing Library, Cypress
🎨 Style with Tailwind CSS, CSS modules, styled-components
⚡ Optimize performance: lazy loading, code splitting, bundle analysis

phases.title: Production-Ready & Full Stack
items: 🔧 Build a complete project with Next.js (App Router, SSR, ISR)
☁️ Deploy to Vercel/Netlify, set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions
🤖 Add authentication (NextAuth, Clerk) and database (Supabase, Prisma)
📊 Monitor performance: Lighthouse, Core Web Vitals, Sentry
💼 Polish portfolio with 3 production-quality projects and case studies
